# Experience Command v58

Experience Command is the single command-grade front door for GoalOS AGIJobManager Ascension. It preserves every built public page while giving non-technical and advanced users a clean path into the right proof surface.

## What it demonstrates

- Every public route remains discoverable.
- The user starts from intent instead of a wall of links.
- Proof surfaces are grouped by trust, evidence, loop, RSI, ASI-horizon governance, settlement, architecture, and legal boundary.
- The page exports a local `GoalOSExperienceCommandReceipt` without network calls or browser storage.

## Boundary

No account, no form, no wallet, no analytics, no cookies, no browser storage, no network request from the demo, no transaction broadcast, no production authority, and no user data wanted.
